texts: This is the exploration video of you in the entire scene earlier:
The top-down image of the scene is:

Where on the top-down image does your current location correspond to?
Please provide coordinates normalized to the range [0, 999], with the x-axis pointing to the right of the top-down image and the y-axis pointing to the bottom of the top-down image.
Please provide the answer directly in the format <point>x y</point>.
